promptCostGp.hint: Prompt user to spend variable GP upon use.
promptCostGp.label: Prompt GP

promptCostHp.hint: Prompt user to spend variable HP upon use.
promptCostHp.label: Prompt HP

promptCostMp.hint: Prompt user to spend variable MP upon use.
promptCostMp.label: Prompt MP

promptHeighten.hint: Prompt user to heighten upon use.
promptHeighten.label: Prompt Heighten

promptTemplate.hint: Prompt user to place a template upon use.
promptTemplate.label: Prompt Template

automaticallyWound.hint: Automatically apply down, critically wounded, and dead statuses?
automaticallyWound.label: Auto Wound

disabled.hint: If checked, these dice will not be given to the actor.
disabled.label: Disabled

formula.hint: A formula for these stat dice. It can have variables and multiple terms, but it must be positive and must not have dice listed recursively. For instance, 1d4 and (@p)d4 are both valid. But -1d4 and (1d4)d4 are not.
formula.label: Formula

PANELS.name: Stat Die
PANELS.text: You have rolled a stat die.
PANELS.title: Description

raw.hint: The quantity of the specified unit.
raw.label: Quantity

absent.hint: What conditions must be absent in order for this ability to be active?
absent.label: Absent Conditions

present.hint: What conditions must be present in order for this ability to be active?
present.label: Present Conditions

dawn.hint: Does the effect expire at dawn?
dawn.label: Dawn

description.hint: Optional description that overrides the default duration text.
description.label: Description

stationary.hint: Do you need to be stationary for this ability to be active?
stationary.label: Stationary

triggers.hint: Things that will cause this ability's effect to expire.
triggers.label: Triggers

unit.hint: The unit of time for this duration.
unit.label: Unit

PANELS.name: Hit Die
PANELS.text: You restore the rolled number of @L[Core:Hit Points and Mana Points]{HP} and are @L[Keyword:Awaken]{awakened}.

Identify.ask: Asking GMs to approve identification of {name}.
Identify.noDocumentsMessage: There are no effects to reveal.
Identify.question: Should {user} identify {item}?
Identify.title: Identify Item

ReadMagic.ask: Asking GMs to approve reading magic on {name}.
ReadMagic.failPrefix: Could not ask to read magic.
ReadMagic.failure: {name} was not successfully read magic on.
ReadMagic.question: Should {user} read magic on {item}?
ReadMagic.title: Read Magic

Unidentify.name: Unidentified {type}
Unidentify.noDocumentsMessage: There are no effects to hide.

PANELS.name: Mana Die
PANELS.text: You restore the rolled number of @L[Core:Hit Points and Mana Points]{MP}.

raw.hint: How this interacts with armor and blocking.
raw.label: Piercing

Reroll.content: This stat die is already spent. Would you like to roll it anyways? If you just want to unroll it, right click on the stat die instead.
Reroll.title: Reroll Stat Die?

enabled.hint: If this should be able to store other equipment within it.
enabled.label: Storage

maxCount.hint: The maximum number of other pieces of equipment this can store.
maxCount.label: Maximum Count
maxCount.over: Over Maximum Number of Items Carried

maxWeight.hint: The maximum weight this can store.
maxWeight.label: Maximum Weight

weightMultiplier.hint: An amount to multiply the weight of all things this stores by.
weightMultiplier.label: Weight Multiplier

autoColoration.hint: Automatically change this token's tint color when its actor is wounded.
autoColoration.label: Automatic Coloration

autoDetectionModes.hint: Automatically change this token's detection mode.
autoDetectionModes.label: Automatic Detection Modes

autoLighting.hint: Automatically configure light emitted from this token.
autoLighting.label: Automatic Lighting

autoMagic.hint: Automatically apply Token Magic FX to this token for relevant conditions.
autoMagic.label: Automatic Effects

autoScale.hint: Automatically scale this token to match its actor's size.
autoScale.label: Automatic Scale

autoTransformation.hint: Automatically change this token when its actor is transformed.
autoTransformation.label: Automatic Transformation

autoVisionAngle.hint: Automatically change this token's vision angle.
autoVisionAngle.label: Automatic Vision Angle

autoVisionModes.hint: Automatically change this token's vision mode.
autoVisionModes.label: Automatic Vision Modes

autoVisionRange.hint: Automatically change this token's vision range.
autoVisionRange.label: Automatic Vision Range
